purpose: LIVE shadow (log-only) validation of the E-DET recommended S1 onset-detector profiles (runs/ds4/20260710_edet_s1_detector_tuning). Capture the per-layer S1 sensor (patch 0012) on live static-mask REAP runs never before instrumented for S1, then offline-replay the recommended EWMA-CUSUM ARM/FIRE detector on those logs and compare its arm/fire positions with the real text collapse onset. No CLAIMS touched.

pod.cuda_gate: PASS (torch cuda_avail True, real 2048x2048 matmul ok, device_count 1). First community machine d5r94zi8wuwh FAILED the gate (/dev/nvidia-uvm open -> EIO, the T1 broken-UVM class) and was terminated before any download.
pod.note: RAM-hot after first load (81 GB model page-cached in 125 GB). All t/s here are POD, DIAGNOSTIC ONLY (sensor trace on), not comparable to the local 3060.

build.inline_patches: 0011 reap-mask, 0012 S1 sensor (DS4_REAP_SENSOR_LOG), 0013 reap-wrap, 0014 PACE, 0015-0018 rotation
build.note: Same live-tree build (md5 771a39a8) that produced the E-DET reference S1 series A (K91) and C (aggressive pod r1); maximises comparability with the offline tuning.

S1_sensor: patch 0012: per (token,layer) row pos,layer,pruned_mass,total_mass; S1 = pruned/total = pre-bias router mass landing on masked experts. Emitted while g_reap_mask_on. Under this build the env-PACE mask engages from the first decoded token, so rows start at pos = prompt_len (78 cyberpunk / 231 coffee).

protocol.server: /root/bin/ds4-server -m ds4-2bit.gguf --cuda --ssd-streaming --ssd-streaming-cache-experts 256 --prefill-chunk 512 -c <ctx> -n <smax> --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8014 --cors (one server process per run; sensor CSV per run)
protocol.mask_env_static_K: DS4_PACE=1 WARMUP=50 KEEP=K KEEP_MIN=K KEEP_MAX=96 KEEP_STEP=0 BREATH_EVERY=999999 RELEARN=0 ROTATE=0 WRAP=1 (= m1a/series-C env with rotation OFF => STATIC). + DS4_REAP_SENSOR_LOG. Trace routing OFF (sensor is independent).
protocol.prompts: html = exact cyberpunk PROMPTS['html'] (78 tok); html_coffee = exact PROMPTS['html_coffee'] (231 tok), both from scripts/run_ds4_exchange_matrix.py

runs.note: BYTE-IDENTICAL to run1_r00 (content + s1.csv sha256); not re-stored
SKIPPED: provably redundant (r00==r01 byte-identical => determinism established, cf. armA 3/3)
first 12000 sensor rows byte-identical to run2_r00 (greedy determinism => full identity); remainder skipped
finished at 310 tok finish=stop (complete page); no collapse

shadow_detector.common: pre_alpha(EWMA)=0.50, base_lag=32, base_win=128, min_base=32, calib_win=128, refractory=64
shadow_detector.onset_estimate: char-proportional (same convention as the offline REPORT): text_onset_pos = prompt_len + round(loop_char_offset/total_chars * completion_tokens)
